tasks.label: Publish Release (Standalone EXE)
args: dotnet publish "${workspaceFolder}/PrepareNewMod.csproj" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeAllContentForSelfExtract=true -p:PublishTrimmed=false -o "${workspaceFolder}/bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item "${workspaceFolder}/bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/PrepareNewMod.exe" "${workspaceFolder}/PrepareNewMod.exe" -Force; Write-Host "Standalone EXE refreshed at ${workspaceFolder}/PrepareNewMod.exe"
